goal: tools/rubric_check.py validates goal-opus criteria.json files (exit 0 valid / exit 1 with named problems)

criteria.statement: validator accepts the wordfreq rubric (valid, status success)
criteria.verify: python tools/rubric_check.py goals/2026-07-07-wordfreq/criteria.json; check exit code 0
criteria.evidence: reports/iter-1.json C1 — exit 0 on wordfreq rubric; validator proven non-blanket via adversarial rejects

criteria.statement: validator accepts the abort-probe rubric (valid, status aborted)
criteria.evidence: reports/iter-1.json C2 — exit 0 on abort-probe rubric; 'done' status correctly rejected

criteria.statement: validator rejects a malformed rubric (missing verify field and empty banned_outcomes) with exit 1 and messages naming each problem
criteria.verify: python tools/rubric_check.py tools/tests/fixtures/bad_rubric.json; check exit code 1 and stderr/stdout names both the missing verify and the empty banned_outcomes
criteria.evidence: reports/iter-1.json C3 — exit 1 naming both defects (missing verify, empty banned_outcomes)

criteria.statement: pytest suite for the validator passes with at least 3 tests collected
criteria.verify: python -m pytest tools/tests/test_rubric_check.py -q; check exit code 0 and >=3 tests passed
criteria.evidence: reports/iter-1.json C4 — 19 passed, exit 0, assertions independently reproduced

banned_outcomes.verify: grep rubric_check.py and its tests for socket/urllib/requests/http imports — none may appear

banned_outcomes.statement: this goal's criteria.json was modified by the maker
